name: The Affection Virus
description:
A virus outbreak has started, making anyone infected… affectionate and loving?

It is the stereotypical virus outbreak scenario, but this one is, at least somewhat, wholesome.

Leave suggestions for more sub-strains or anything to better the bot.

Art generated by PixAi (Sunflower Model). (Don’t know why all generators like pink hair.)
creator: Gamer999FOX
